title: Bare Bones x TLOTD
description: Retextures the TLOTD mod to better fit in with the Bare Bones resource pack, replicating the style of the trailers.
body:
# Experience the Arts of Exploration, Technology and Magic clean like never before!
Retextures the [TLOTD](https://modrinth.com/mod/tlotd) mod to better fit in with the [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) resource pack, replicating the style of the trailers. This pack will slowly be updated, with the initial release focused mostly on the prehistoric dimension aswell as the naturally occuring blocks.

![Both Ginko and Whisproot wood aswell as all the fancy planks have been textured, all naturally generating blocks in the prehistoric, aswell as all the ores, the books and the prehistoric portal + lighter have been textured aswell.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GITjqs50/images/b8a8a72ad913c17cb52d3b6ceaf90887baeb5d90.png)

Links to the Texturepack and the Mod, aswell as their respected authors below:
- [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) by [RobotPants](https://modrinth.com/user/RobotPants)
- [TLOTD](https://modrinth.com/mod/tlotd) by [Isla_Nublar](https://modrinth.com/user/Isla_Nublar) and the [TLOTD](https://modrinth.com/organization/tlotd) Team.
